circleSettings.title: Circle settings
circleSettings.description: Your account is automatically connected to a Circle when you create or join one. Easily invite friends by sharing the unique Circle code or link below. You'll receive a notification below when someone requests to join your Circle. If you'd like to leave, simply hit the 'Leave Circle' button.
circleSettings.leaveConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to leave this circle?
circleSettings.webhookDescription: Enter a webhook URL to receive notifications for circle events

accountSettings.title: Account Settings
accountSettings.dangerZoneDescription: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.

localization.title: Localization
localization.description: Customize language, date format, and regional preferences for your account.
localization.dateFormatDescription: Choose how dates should be displayed throughout the application
localization.firstDayOfWeekDescription: Select which day starts your week

sidepanel.title: Sidepanel Customization
sidepanel.description: Customize the layout and visibility of cards in the sidepanel. This section is only available on large screen devices such as tablets and desktops.

theme.title: Theme preferences
theme.description: Choose how the site looks to you. Select a single theme, or sync with your system and automatically switch between day and night themes.
